bird.name: Mangrove gerygone
bird.summary: The mangrove gerygone (Gerygone levigaster) is a species of bird in the Australian warbler family Acanthizidae. The species is also known a…

locations.name: 新幾內亞島
locations.summary: 新畿內亞島（英語：New Guinea；巴布亞皮欽語：Niugini；印尼語：Papua）位於澳大利亞北面，是世界上第二大島嶼與最高島嶼。有時，本島亦被稱為「巴布亞」，但有時巴布亞亦單指本島的一部份。此外，印尼官方过去稱呼本島為「伊里安岛…

locations.name: 金伯利 (西澳)
locations.summary: 金伯利（Kimberley）是澳大利亚西澳大利亚州的九个地区之一，位于西澳州的北部，西临印度洋，北临帝汶海，南为大沙沙漠和塔纳米沙漠，东则与澳大利亚北领地接壤。 该地区以位于南非的金伯利钻石矿区命名，因这两个区域在地形、风景和资源方面均有…

relations.subject: Mangrove gerygone
relations.evidence: pallida, found in southern New Guinea, the nominate race G

relations.subject: Mangrove gerygone
relations.evidence: Where its range overlaps with that of the large-billed gerygone in the Kimberley it is actually displaced from the mangroves and is instead found in scrubland dominated by paperbarks and acacia
